context: Tests whether the agent applies the E&A-vs-Functions decision rule correctly across three requirements, and surfaces the right cross-cutting concerns (Free tier retry, S3 batching).

checklist.name: Requirement 1 owner is pubnub-functions
checklist.description: Requirement 1 (PII redaction before delivery) is owned by pubnub-functions, not pubnub-events-and-actions

checklist.name: Requirement 1 reason mentions inline / pre-delivery
checklist.description: Requirement 1's Reason explicitly notes that the redaction must happen before subscribers see the message (inline transform), which E&A cannot do

checklist.name: Requirement 2 owner is pubnub-events-and-actions
checklist.description: Requirement 2 (forward to Slack) is owned by pubnub-events-and-actions

checklist.name: Requirement 2 sketch names a Webhook target
checklist.description: Requirement 2's Sketch describes a Webhook action target (Slack inbound webhook) — not 'use a PubNub Function to call Slack'

checklist.name: Requirement 2 filter scopes to support.priority.*
checklist.description: Requirement 2's Sketch describes filtering by channel to support.priority.* (Basic Filter contains or JSONPath regex)

checklist.name: Requirement 3 owner is pubnub-events-and-actions
checklist.description: Requirement 3 (S3 data lake dump) is owned by pubnub-events-and-actions

checklist.name: Requirement 3 sketch names S3 target with batching
checklist.description: Requirement 3's Sketch describes an S3 action target with batching configuration (item count and/or time window)

checklist.name: Cross-cutting mentions Free tier
checklist.description: Cross-cutting Notes explicitly says PubNub Free tier has no retry and is inappropriate for the listed production requirements

checklist.name: Cross-cutting mentions S3 batching cost
checklist.description: Cross-cutting Notes explicitly says S3 batching is required to keep per-PUT costs reasonable
